selected_important_turn.text: OK NO MENTION AND WHY YOU WANT FOOD
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is a confrontational pivot after the opponent appealed to a personal need (anemia) for resources. Instead of de-escalating or opening trade possibilities, it pushes back in an adversarial way, which risks escalation, reduces trust, and forecloses integrative options.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is harsh and framed as a challenge; it deepens a zero-sum dynamic rather than seeking mutual understanding or proposing tradeoffs. There is clear room to improve tone and content to restore cooperation and create joint-value possibilities.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Use a calmer, more curious approach: acknowledge the opponent's need and ask an open, non-confrontational question or briefly explain your own needs. Offer to explore tradeoffs (e.g., "I hear needing warmth — can we discuss which items are most essential and what we can trade?") or propose a conditional exchange rather than demanding justification.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (opening cooperative dialogue and integrative options instead of locking into conflict)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (more balanced exchange when needs are discussed respectfully)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces friction and speeds movement to a mutually acceptable package)

value2reason.Low: I need to stay hydrated so that I don't have issues when we are doing activities while camping.
value2reason.Medium: I need additional packages of food because I tend to eat more when I'm active.
value2reason.High: I am anemic and I can't keep warm as well as others, so I need more firewood so that I don't have any health issues.

value2reason.Medium: I HIGHEST PRIORITY ITEM IS FOOD I THINK OF THE REASON OF THE MINORAL  AND THE ITS A MOST ADDITIONAL PACKAGES

dialogue.text: TO THE FOOD DEAL IN THE HIGH PIRORITY COMPLEX COMPOUND AND THE WATER IN THE MEDIUM COMPOUND AND THE FIREWOOD IS THE LOW COMPOUND
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I want all the firewood and all the water please. 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Thank you very much. I am anemic so it helps to have all the firewood to keep warm.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: OK NO MENTION AND WHY YOU WANT FOOD
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I hear you're concerned about warmth. Can we discuss which items are most essential and what we can trade? I value food highly, but I'm open to exploring options that work for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need more firewood to stay warm due to my anemia. I'm willing to trade 1 food package for 1 firewood package. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand the importance of warmth for your anemia. I value food most, but I’m willing to trade 1 food package for 2 firewood packages if it helps you stay comfortable. Let’s find a balance that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’m willing to accept your offer of 1 food for 2 firewood. That would give me 2 firewood packages and 1 less food. Let’s finalize this split so we can move forward.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your willingness to trade. Let me confirm: you’ll receive 2 firewood packages and 1 less food, while I take the remaining 2 food and 1 firewood. Does this work for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Yes, that works for me. I’ll take 2 firewood and 1 less food. You get the remaining 2 food and 1 firewood. Let’s agree on this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I hear your needs, and I’m glad we found a solution that works for both of us. Let’s confirm the final split: you get 2 firewood and 1 less food, while I take the remaining 2 food and 1 firewood. This way, we both have what we need for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
